label: AI Insight UI — Alerts
info: Exposes GET /api/v1/alerts which reads from global.alerts (a bounded ring buffer written by the simulation observability tab whenever an error is caught). Empty array when no alerts have been published yet.

name: build alerts response
initialize:
// Ensure the ring exists (does not overwrite if already populated).
if (!global.get('alerts')) global.set('alerts', []);

name: catch all (uncaught flow errors → alerts ring)
push to global.alerts (bounded)
